spec.description: Domain registration expiration health and exporter runtime status for prometheus-domain-exporter

spec.title: Full Collection Success
spec.description: Ratio of exporter instances whose last full domain registration collection completed without any target errors

spec.title: Last Successful Refresh Age
spec.description: Time elapsed since the last fully successful Domain registration collection

spec.title: Exporter Runtime Snapshot
spec.description: Exporter process runtime information including version, branch, uptime, memory, goroutines, open file descriptors, and scrape duration

spec.title: Exporter CPU
spec.description: Exporter CPU usage over time

spec.title: Exporter Memory
spec.description: Exporter resident memory

spec.title: Exporter Heap Detail
spec.description: Go heap allocation, in-use, idle, and released memory

spec.title: Exporter GC Rate
spec.description: Go garbage collection frequency

spec.title: Exporter Scrape Up
spec.description: Prometheus scrape availability

spec.title: Exporter Scrape Duration
spec.description: Prometheus scrape duration

spec.title: Exporter Scrape Samples
spec.description: Prometheus samples after metric relabeling

spec.title: Lookup Success Changes
spec.description: Number of check success state changes over the last 24 hours

spec.title: Lookup Changes
spec.description: Number of chain verification state changes over the last 24 hours

spec.title: Expiry Changes
spec.description: Changes in registration expiration remaining

spec.title: Problem Domains
spec.description: Domains that failed RDAP verification

spec.title: Configured Domain Counts
spec.description: Configured Domain registration files and remote TLS targets

spec.title: Lookup Success Ratio
spec.description: Ratio of configured domains whose last RDAP lookup completed without an error, grouped by exporter instance

spec.title: Registration Verified Ratio
spec.description: Ratio of configured domains that RDAP confirmed as registered, grouped by exporter instance

spec.title: Registration Lookup Success Ratio
spec.description: Ratio of configured domains whose last registration lookup completed without an error, grouped by exporter instance

spec.title: Exporter Goroutines
spec.description: Exporter goroutine count

spec.title: Exporter Open FDs
spec.description: Exporter open file descriptors

spec.title: Exporter Collection Age
spec.description: Seconds since the last successful Domain registration collection

spec.title: Exporter Full Collection Success
spec.description: Last full domain registration collection success state; this is 0 when any configured target fails

spec.title: Failed Lookups
spec.description: Number of Domain registration checks that returned an error (connection timeout, RDAP lookup failure, or DNS resolution error)

spec.title: Expired Domains
spec.description: Number of domains past their registration expiry date

spec.title: Unverified Domains
spec.description: Domains that could not be verified by RDAP

spec.title: Registration Expiry
spec.description: Registration expiry remaining per domain (days)

spec.title: Domain Lookup Health
spec.description: Successful checks and chain verification over time

spec.title: Domain Inventory
spec.description: Domain registration expiry and identity labels

spec.title: Expiring Soon
spec.description: Domains expiring in less than 14 days

spec.title: Configured Domains
spec.description: Number of configured domains

spec.title: Earliest Expiry
spec.description: Minimum domain registration expiry remaining across all domains

spec.title: Latest Lookup Age
spec.description: Time since the most recent successful domain registration lookup

spec.title: Domain Count
spec.description: Domain count per domain and target

spec.title: Lookup Coverage
spec.description: Share of configured checks with an emitted chain verification result

spec.title: Domain Validity Window
spec.description: Domain validity window length in days

spec.title: Domain Age
spec.description: Days since domain was first observed

spec.title: Days Remaining by Domain
spec.description: Days until domain registration expiry per domain and target

spec.title: Domain Registration Expiry

spec.name: job
spec.label: job
spec.description: Prometheus scrape job exposing domain_exporter metrics
